description: An Arctic sea ice physicist requires a winter climatological baseline assessment. Read the research brief at ~/Desktop/arctic_anomaly_brief.txt. Using the NOAA OI SST climatology data in ~/PanoplyData/sst.ltm.1991-2020.nc, create a polar-projected map of Arctic Sea Surface Temperatures for February. Document the West Spitsbergen Current warming anomaly by comparing SST values west of Svalbard with values in the Canadian Arctic at the same latitude (~78°N). Export the map and the structured text report to ~/Documents/ArcticResearch/.
